Thanks for the contribution!

should be opened as separate PRs.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Build / CI / chore

## How was this tested?

<!-- Manual steps, screenshots, or links to a test branch deployment. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds locally
- [ ] No real secrets in the diff (tokens, keys, passwords, internal URLs)
- [ ] User-facing changes are reflected in `README.md` or `public/architecture.html` where relevant
